case_number: Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. D-52 of 2024

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. D-52 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No.2116/ 2020. 3. For order on M.A No.2117/ 2020. 4. For order on M.A No.2118/ 2020. 5. For hearing of main case. 24-11-2025. None present for the appellant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = None present for the appellant; same was the position on last two dates of hearing viz 29-09-2025 and 03-11-2025. Continuous absence of appellant and his counsel shows that they have lost their interest to pursue this Criminal Acquittal Appeal, therefore, same alongwith listed applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Saleem*
